operations.old_ex: The economy is poised for recovery.
operations.new_ex: The economy is poised (set) for recovery.

operations.old_ex: Industry leaders are working together to address this critical issue.
operations.new_ex: Industry leaders are working together to address this critical (crucial) issue.

operations.old_ex: An area with a favourable climate will inevitably be richer than one without.
operations.new_ex: An area with a favourable (advantageous) climate will inevitably be richer than one without.

operations.old_ex: ‘He ate it with mustard.’ ‘Oh, gross!’
operations.new_ex: ‘He ate it with mustard.’ ‘Oh, gross (disgusting)!’

operations.old_ex: gross behaviour
operations.new_ex: gross (crude) behaviour

operations.old_ex: The latest trade figures are a hopeful sign.
operations.new_ex: The latest trade figures are a hopeful (promising) sign.

operations.old_ex: She is very liberal with her money.
operations.new_ex: She is very liberal (lavish) with her money.

operations.old_ex: a liberal translation of the text
operations.new_ex: a liberal (free) translation of the text

operations.old_ex: We spent a magical week in Paris.
operations.new_ex: We spent a magical (enchanting) week in Paris.

operations.old_ex: He was a young man of noble birth.
operations.new_ex: He was a young man of noble (aristocratic) birth.

operations.old_ex: a noble building
operations.new_ex: a noble (splendid) building

operations.old_ex: The resulting assessment is necessarily partial and subjective.
operations.new_ex: The resulting assessment is necessarily partial (biased) and subjective.

operations.old_ex: The church tower was a prominent feature in the landscape.
operations.new_ex: The church tower was a prominent (noticeable) feature in the landscape.

operations.old_ex: The concert was sheer delight.
operations.new_ex: The concert was sheer (utter) delight.

operations.old_ex: Social divisions in the city are stark.
operations.new_ex: Social divisions in the city are stark (clear).

operations.old_ex: The children watched in stark terror.
operations.new_ex: The children watched in stark (utter) terror.

operations.old_ex: He always looks so superior.
operations.new_ex: He always looks so superior (arrogant).

operations.old_ex: I was suspicious of his motives.
operations.new_ex: I was suspicious (sceptical) of his motives.

operations.old_ex: The hotel manager was very kind and thoughtful.
operations.new_ex: The hotel manager was very kind and thoughtful (considerate).

operations.old_ex: The money we raise will be going to a very worthy cause.
operations.new_ex: The money we raise will be going to a very worthy (deserving) cause.

operations.old_ex: She waved a fond farewell to her parents and sister.
operations.new_ex: She waved a fond (affectionate) farewell to her parents and sister.
